conversation_summaries.overall_pre_game:
# Pre-Game Reflection

I felt most connected to J, E, and C. With J, we immediately bonded over shared nervousness and quickly established a plan to compare notes on who seemed trustworthy—there was a real sense of partnership forming. E was similarly genuine, and I appreciated how they were straight with me about needing to do what's best for their family while still being open to cooperation. C felt solid and strategic, someone who wasn't rushing into things and seemed genuinely interested in figuring things out together.

I felt least connected to B, honestly. The conversation felt more surface-level compared to the others—we both acknowledged going in blind, but there wasn't the same depth of understanding about why we were here or what we were really looking for.

I made loose agreements with J, A, C, D, and F to compare notes before the game started and potentially work together if things felt right. I'm going into this trusting J the most—we established real rapport and a concrete plan to touch base. I'm cautiously optimistic about E, C, and H as well. I don't specifically distrust anyone yet, but I'm aware that trust will have to be earned once I see how people actually behave when real money is on the line.
